title: 22:31 ГўВЂВ” December 12, 2022
body_text:
22:31 ГўВЂВ” December 12, 2022
Automated Funds Transfers (AFT) Update
We updated regional references in the AFT documentation as these products are now available nationally. Since references to time zones vary, we advise calculating your equivalent time based on the information provided.
AFT Volume
Introduction to AFT
Section 1.6, Contacts and Websites
We updated the contact information on obtaining the Financial Institutions File.
Section 7.1, AFT File Delivery Deadlines
We removed the region-specific details and added a note advising you to calculate your equivalent time zone.
Originating AFT via PaymentStream AFT
Section 12.1, Overview of Approval of Tasks/Transactions
We removed the region-specific details and added a note advising you to calculate your equivalent time zone.
AFT Rejects, Recalls, Error Corrections, and Other Exception Items
Section 5.2, Recall Deadlines, Restrictions, and Processing
Section 5.3, Error Correction Deadlines, Restrictions, and Processing
We changed time zone references to ГўВЂВњlocal timeГўВЂВќ.
We revised the following forms.
